# 我的技术博客 · My Tech Blog

> 个人技术知识库，涵盖软件开发、系统管理、网络技术与人工智能。
> Personal technical knowledge base covering software development, system administration, networking, and AI.

This site is a structured, hands-on technical reference written in Chinese (primary) and English.
All content is original notes and practice summaries from real-world engineering work.

Site URL: https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/
Language: Chinese (zh-CN) primary, English (/en/) secondary
Author: adcwb
License: Content CC BY-NC-SA 4.0

---

## Software Development / 软件开发

- [Python Development](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/软件开发/python开发/): Python fundamentals, web frameworks (Django, Flask, DRF, Tornado), web scraping, testing, network programming, and utility scripts.
- [Golang Development](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/软件开发/golang开发/): Go language fundamentals, concurrency model, standard library, plugins, frameworks, and high-performance service patterns.
- [Rust Development](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/软件开发/rust开发/): Ownership and lifetimes, memory safety, systems programming, and Rust frameworks.
- [PHP Development](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/软件开发/php开发/): PHP basics, database integration, and web backend frameworks.
- [Web Development](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/软件开发/web开发/): Frontend engineering with React, Vue, Angular; HTTP protocol and API design.

## System Administration / 系统管理

- [Linux Systems](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/系统管理/linux系统/): System services, Shell scripting, common commands, networking, and operational troubleshooting.
- [Cloud Native](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/系统管理/云原生/): Kubernetes, container orchestration, observability, and cloud-native infrastructure.

## Networking / 网络技术

- [Network Technology](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/网络技术/网络技术/): TCP/IP, protocol analysis, routing, switching, and network troubleshooting.
- [Security](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/网络技术/安全/): Web security, penetration testing (Kali), WiFi security, vulnerability discovery, and system hardening.

## Artificial Intelligence / 人工智能

- [Machine Learning](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/人工智能/机器学习基础/): Supervised learning, model evaluation, feature engineering, and classical algorithms.
- [Deep Learning](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/人工智能/深度学习基础/): Neural networks, CNN/RNN architectures, training, and optimization.
- [LLM Applications](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/人工智能/大模型应用/): Large language models, prompt engineering, RAG, and production deployment.

## Databases / 数据库

- [MySQL](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/数据库/mysql数据库/): Schema design, query optimization, indexing, and transactions.
- [PostgreSQL](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/数据库/postgresql/): Advanced SQL, extensions, and performance tuning.
- [InfluxDB](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/数据库/influxdb/): Time-series data storage and querying.
- [SQL Server](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/数据库/sqlserver/): Windows-ecosystem SQL Server operations.

## Data Analysis / 数据分析

- [Business Data Analysis](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/数据分析/业务数据分析/): Data cleaning, visualization, and analytical methodology.
- [Office Automation](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/数据分析/办公自动化/): Python-powered office automation workflows.

## Finance / 金融相关

- [Finance & Trading](https://adcwb.github.io/new-docs/docs/金融相关/): Quantitative analysis, stocks, futures, and Web3 fundamentals.

---
